mapper.sql: id, provider_key, display_name, st_source, model_name, reverse_proxy, proxy_password, custom_url, priority, enabled, failure_threshold, cooldown_seconds, consecutive_failures, circuit_open_until, last_error, last_used_at, last_health_status, note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_st_model_provider ORDER BY enabled DESC, priority ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_st_model_provider WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_st_model_provider WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_st_model_provider WHERE provider_key = #{providerKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_st_model_provider SET provider_key = #{providerKey}, display_name = #{displayName}, st_source = #{stSource}, model_name = #{modelName}, reverse_proxy = #{reverseProxy}, proxy_password = #{proxyPassword}, custom_url = #{customUrl}, priority = #{priority}, enabled = #{enabled}, failure_threshold = #{failureThreshold}, cooldown_seconds = #{cooldownSeconds}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE app_st_model_provider SET consecutive_failures = 0, circuit_open_until = NULL, last_error = '', last_health_status = 'healthy', last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE provider_key = #{providerKey}

UPDATE app_st_model_provider SET consecutive_failures = consecutive_failures + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, last_health_status = 'failing', last_used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, circuit_open_until = CASE WHEN consecutive_failures + 1 >= #{failureThreshold} THEN DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL #{cooldownSeconds} SECOND) ELSE circuit_open_until END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE provider_key = #{providerKey}
